# MDE v1.3.4

## Features

* No new end-user features in this release.

## Bug Fixes

* Fixed the editor cursor jumping to the end of the document after the 5-second idle autosave completes.
* Kept the current BlockNote document mounted when autosave persistence catches up with the local draft, so users can continue typing in the same middle-document position.
* Preserved legitimate editor rehydration for external persisted content changes.

## Breaking Changes

* None.

## Maintenance

* Added unit coverage for the autosave catch-up path and the external update rehydration path.
* Added E2E coverage that edits in the middle of a document, waits for idle autosave, and verifies continued typing remains in the middle instead of moving to the end.

## Verification

* `npm run lint`
* `npm run typecheck`
* `npm run test:unit`
* `npm run test:integration`
* `npm run test:e2e`

## Artifacts

* macOS Apple Silicon: `MDE-1.3.4-mac-arm64.dmg`, `MDE-1.3.4-mac-arm64.zip`
* macOS Intel: `MDE-1.3.4-mac-x64.dmg`, `MDE-1.3.4-mac-x64.zip`
* Windows x64: `MDE-1.3.4-win-x64.exe`
* Update metadata: `latest-mac.yml`, `latest.yml`

macOS artifacts remain unsigned when Apple Developer ID signing secrets are not configured; MDE downloads and opens the DMG so users can drag the app into Applications.
